text:
Created attachment 163753
new port.

The World's First Cross-Platform Scalable FREE Multi-Protocol Soft Switch.

WWW: http://www.freeswitch.org/

This port requires libyuv, which is not commited to the ports tree at the moment of writing this.

libyuv port is submitted in this bug report:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=204958
